text: We’re currently planning our trip to Japan, and I’m especially excited about visiting several Hard Rock Cafes along the way! My list includes Yokohama, Tokyo, Kyoto, and Osaka. One of my favorite parts of traveling is discovering new cafes, collecting pins, classic tees and experiencing the unique vibe each Hard Rock location has to offer. I can’t wait to explore these cities and add some new memories and pins and t-shirts to my collection!
My wife went on a trip to Sri Lanka and the Maldives, and she was kind enough to bring me as pin from HRC Maldives.
My nephew went on a city trip to Rome and brought me a pin from Hard Rock Cafe Rome. Thanks!
I noticed my pin from Tromsø was missing, so I’ve just added it.
